text:
恰恰相反，codex cli 做的很难用，不如 claude code 代码有价值。

但如果你只是要做一个 ai agent，没必要用 claude code 或者 codex 代码，pi-mono 这种轻量级的库更适合你。
🚨 How it feels knowing Anthropic is now officially more open than OpenAI https://t.co/vaQTCX8f1U

RT @godofprompt: 🚨 BREAKING: Claude Code source code just leaked

Everyone says they went through 600K lines of the code

The irony is that…
RT @godofprompt: 🚨 How it feels knowing Anthropic is now officially more open than OpenAI https://t.co/vaQTCX8f1U

"The grid itself is civilization."

Radiant CEO Doug Bernauer on productizing nuclear energy:

"Nuclear reactors as products has never been seen before."

"They're always usually these giant mega projects where you dig a huge hole in the ground and you take 5 to 10 years." https://t.co/L3VHtgwWzI
